basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Counsellor and Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Psychology/Social work/Sociology, ANM / GNM / BSc Nursing
qualification.details: Counsellor: Graduate in Psychology/Social work/Sociology (preferable: Masters in above disciplines) Nurse: ANM (preferable: GNM / BSc Nursing)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Skill Test (if needed)

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Kalyani Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Kalyani recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Counsellor and Nurse posts at AIIMS Kalyani is scheduled for 19th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: For the Counsellor position, candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Psychology, Social Work, or Sociology. A Master's degree in these disciplines is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Nurse position should have completed ANM. GNM or BSc Nursing qualifications are preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Counsellor and Nurse posts is between 21 years and 40 years. Specific age relaxations are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for both Counsellor and Nurse roles will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor and Nurse posts?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is recruiting for a total of 3 vacancies. One vacancy is for the Counsellor post, and two vacancies are for the Nurse post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for AIIMS Kalyani recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview, followed by Document Verification. A Skill Test may also be conducted if deemed necessary.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani, Kalyani, West Bengal, 741245. Candidates must report to the specified venue.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.
